item.dc:creator: deafkitten

item.title: Unexpectedly WHOLESOME Saturday dump of smiles and hugs
item.description:
1. Wait a minute...
2. The Anti-Karen : )
3
4. Daddy's arm is all he needs : )
5. Giving a special someone a present for her birthday
6. He really likes the turn table
7. It's never too early to start dancing
8. Adorable Japanese students doing their school assignment
9. Metalheads create protective moshpit around grandma so she can join the show at Sweden Rock Festival
10. Not all heroes wear capes. Some wear high visibility vests.
11. A random act of kindness : )
12. Look at this baby racoon in a bee outfit
13. What is this? A McDonalds's for bees? Why yes, yes it is!
14
15. Thanks for scrolling all the way trough! Hope this dump made you happy! Finally I would like to share with you a little passion project of mine. Me and my brother are making a game that is inspired by "The Stanley Parable" and the narrator definitely has a touch a of GladOS to him. The game is part of Next Fest 2024 and it would the mean the world to us if you wishlisted: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: Animal dump
item.dc:creator: kixxarse1986

item.title: Nobody can upset you without your consent.
item.dc:creator: CaptainZiploc

item.title: The world is better with you in it.
item.description: I lost my son to suicide. He was 17. He thought he couldn't ask for help. He thought he had to deal with the weight of the world alone. But he was wrong. The world is a better place with you in it. You being here makes the rest of us better off. So long as you live, there are choices and options and hope. You know the number to call, but it's up to you to call it. Ask for help. Suicide is never the answer. Sincerely, An Imgur Dad
item.dc:creator: dvdlndn

item.title: Bottom shelf HONK.
item.description:
@HileyNoteson Yoooooooooooooooooooooo
Still unsure about joining the Bottom Shelf Community server? Check out our museum of stupidity. https://imgur.com/gallery/FYpqqAf Join for the games! Shit, man. We play everything...if there's a specific game you like, I guarantee you'll find a shitposting meme loving Imgurian there to play it with you. Join for the memes! Imgurians share memes in the meme dumpster 24/7 Join for the Awe! Pay your pet taxes in the pet tax channel Join for the NSFW memes! Join to chat with hilarious people! Join to lurk in the corners! Join for the meme challenges! Join for the shockingly magnificent balance of wholesomeness and chaos. discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka
twitch.tv/bottomshelfvodka Saturdays & Sundays 9:30 - 11:30 p.m. CST Tuesdays - Thursdays 9:30 - 11:30 p.m. CST Follow our channel to be notified next time me, Frothy, and our favorite Imgurians from the Bottom Shelf Community go live!
Speaking of marriage, @FrothyStout and I got married 12 years ago today! Just a couple of dumbass kids who lucked into a dozen years of true friendship. I might just keep him for another dozen years.
Back in the day when I was the general manager of Jimmy John's, one of our drivers forgot to set his parking brake.
Taxi Bear tax.
item.dc:creator: BottomShelfVodka

item.title: Happy Caturday
item.dc:creator: kixxarse1986

item.title: Time for yet another unhinged XL Friday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings, online friends
as is tradition
very dapper
please respect my wishes
uh oh
we've all been there
better listen up, it's the authorities
quite a likeness of Tom Cruise there
also he has cool shades
mmm hmm
i guess
gonna go touch some rn
not again
not sure how that would work but i'm interested
also me at the zoo
still not sure
i have questions
that's my time.. have a great weekend gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: Gotta love when idiots get schooled! Lol
item.dc:creator: DumpingSh1tandBeingKind2

item.title: I'm so embarrassed.
item.description: While bbqing some drumsticks for dinner, a bee flew down my shirt. I wasn't wearing a bra and just yanked my top down from the neck and exposed some bosom while screaming. So of course the neighbors look over to see what all the ruckus was about. I really didn't want to get stung. Guess I'll hide inside and eat my dinner now.
item.dc:creator: Zinfandella
